accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and the CRA context (chapter 8 of title 5, substantially-similar bar, never-took-effect treatment) is verified as accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: Added context naming the Congressional Review Act and its downstream effects is correct, not fabricated.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves and nullifies a DOE appliance-standards certification/labeling/enforcement rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly explains it overturns the identified DOE rule under the CRA so the rule has no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the key CRA condition that the agency is barred from issuing a substantially similar rule absent later authorization.

effective_dates.why: Accurately reports passage dates (House Mar. 5, Senate Apr. 29-30) and approval on May 9, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect—nullifying the rule—and correctly notes no replacement standards are established.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized, internally consistent, and clearly written.

concise.why: Compact with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the Department of Energy, the rule title, the CRA, and citation 89 Fed. Reg. 81994.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation, publication date, and legislative dates are all stated correctly.
